title: Algorithm 1 - Merge Sort
description: Implement the merge sort algorithm in Rust. Merge sort divides the list, recursively sorts each half, then merges them.
hints: Use two indices (i for left, j for right) and compare elements.
Push the smaller element to the result and advance that index.
After one array is exhausted, append the remaining elements from the other.
explanation: Merge sort is a divide-and-conquer algorithm with O(n log n) time complexity. In Rust, it demonstrates recursion, vector slicing, and ownership. The merge function uses two indices to walk through both sorted halves, always picking the smaller element. `Vec::with_capacity` pre-allocates memory for efficiency.
